name: Normalize JSON to BigQuery
description: Reads JSON data from GCS (line-delimited or single JSON array), normalizes name and age fields, tags records by age group, and writes the output to BigQuery.

parameters.name: input_gcs
parameters.label: Input GCS Path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to input JSON file(s). Supports wildcards, e.g. gs://bucket/path/*.json

parameters.name: bq_table
parameters.label: BigQuery Table
parameters.helpText: Target BigQuery table in the format: project:dataset.table

parameters.name: temp_location
parameters.label: Temporary GCS Location
parameters.helpText: GCS path used for temporary files during BigQuery load operations

parameters.name: single_json_array
parameters.label: Single JSON Array Input
parameters.helpText: Set to true if the input file contains a single JSON array instead of line-delimited JSON
